name: Zhejiang Chunhui Intelligent Control Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Chunhui Intelligent Control Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells flow control valve and control systems. The company offers 4-Way reversing valves, expansion valves for car air conditioner, electronic expansion valves, solenoid valves, proportional valves for oil machine, hydraulic valve assemblies for boilers, ABS hydraulic regulators, and gas regulation systems. It also offers other equipment and components, analysis instrument, leisure and comfort shoes, power transmission and transformer, boiler and furnace, power transmission and transformer, solenoid valve, gate valve, meter for liquid and gas, elevator, brake, solenoid valve, generator parts and accessories, physical measuring meter, heater and heat exchange, gasoline and gas pump, pipe and tube, other auto parts, other valves, meter for liquid and gas, and other valves. Zhejiang Chunhui Intelligent Control Co., Ltd. was formerly known as Shaoxing Chunhui Refrigeration Equipment Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Zhejiang Chunhui Intelligent Control Co., Ltd. in November 2001. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Shangyu, China. Zhejiang Chunhui Intelligent Control Co., Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of Zhejiang Chunhui Group Co.,Ltd.
